title: How we work with you.
desc: Deep technical work, not surface-level consulting. We bring real hands-on BESS and AI experience to your specific problem.

cards.title: Battery Testing and Characterization
cards.desc: OCV-IR, EIS, C-rate profiling, thermal cycling, degradation analysis. Engineering-grade reports your team can act on.

cards.title: Custom Python Analytics
cards.desc: End-to-end analytics pipelines for your battery data. From raw BMS exports to dashboards, automated anomaly alerts, and SOH reports.

cards.title: BESS Sizing and Tender Support
cards.desc: Battery plus inverter sizing methodology, BESS tender evaluation, and documentation for projects from 5 kWh to 20 MWh scale.

cards.title: Technical White Papers
cards.desc: Standards-aligned documentation per IEC, UL, and IEEE. Parallel battery operation guidelines, lifecycle policies, and safety protocols.

cards.title: GenAI Workflow Integration
cards.desc: Bringing AI tools into engineering workflows. Automated report generation, LLM-assisted RCA, failure documentation, and knowledge capture.

cards.title: OEM Technical Liaison
cards.desc: FAT coordination, protocol verification, and technical submissions with Chinese and international battery OEMs. We speak the language on both sides.
